features.name: nested interface with dotted sub-interface passed to submodule port
features.description: Code should include a nested interface definition where a parent interface contains a child interface instance, and the child interface is passed to a submodule port using a dotted reference.

features.name: nested interface under generate for with dotted sub-interface submodule connection
features.description: Code should include nested interfaces under a generate for loop where a dotted reference to a sub-interface is passed to a submodule port.

extraction_summary.note: Issue describes nested interface linking failure with dotted sub-interface references passed to submodule ports. Original test case attachment (test_cases.zip) not available in JSON. Features synthesized from issue description.
